prompt: Create a cinematic vertical cyberpunk influencer poster in a neon pink and magenta nighttime city, with wet reflective pavement, skyscrapers covered in glowing billboards, and a futuristic social-media atmosphere. Center one confident male AI creator walking forward out of an enormous upright smartphone shaped like an Instagram screen, wearing a rose pink tailored blazer, white turtleneck, layered silver chains, black slim trousers, and clean white sneakers; his face should be softly anonymized with a square blur while keeping the hair and body sharp. The phone interface shows the Instagram wordmark at top, time 11:11, and exactly 5 story circles across the top labeled Your Story, mtariq.ai, an obscured center profile, viral.king, and luxury.vibe. Place the figure on a glowing rounded rectangular platform with hot-pink edge lighting and the front text Mr. Tariq – followed by AI CREATOR. Surround the scene with exactly 4 large floating social engagement badges: a left-center heart notification with 1, a bottom-left heart notification with 7, an upper-right heart notification with 1, and a mid-right heart-only notification. Add exactly 3 floating neon tech cubes near the upper sky, plus Instagram logo panels and holographic billboards throughout the buildings. Include readable billboard slogans: FOLLOW YOUR DREAMS, CREATE. INSPIRE. INFLUENCE, AI POWERED FUTURE, YOU ARE THE BRAND., and 10M+ FOLLOWERS. On the right side, include a tall billboard showing a full-body duplicate of the man and another portrait billboard. On the lower-left street, include a large retro camera prop with neon outlines. Use dramatic low-angle perspective, glossy reflections, volumetric pink light, high contrast, ultra-detailed 3D realism, sharp fashion editorial lighting, futuristic Instagram branding energy, 4:5 poster composition.
